summary.headline: ADM reports first quarter 2023 earnings per share of $2.12, $2.09 on an adjusted basis.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company (ADM) reported first quarter 2023 financial results, with earnings per share of $2.12 and adjusted earnings per share of $2.09. The company's segment operating profit was $1.719 billion, with strong performance in Ag Services and Oilseeds, while Carbohydrate Solutions and Nutrition segments showed declines. The company also provided commentary on its business segments and strategic outlook.

drivers: excellent risk management in South American origination
higher export demand due to record Brazilian soybean crop
strong soybean exports in North America
solid margins and efficient execution in Global Trade
concerns: lower crush margins in EMEA due to trade flow adjustments from Ukraine war dislocations

drivers: solid demand for starches and sweeteners in North America
concerns: lower ethanol margins due to high industry stock levels
much higher margins in global wheat milling business
lower results in Animal Nutrition due to much lower margins in amino acids
Health Wellness results were lower year-over-year

drivers: improved ADM Investor Services earnings on higher interest income

extraction_notes: Numbers from Exhibit 99.1; cover sheet only had Item references. Some segment commentary was inferred from narrative descriptions.
